title: Receive Notifications via Microsoft Teams Chat (not in a channel)
excerpt: I have several managers on my team who don’t need to be in monday.com day to day, but they do need to reply when they are @mentioned. They receive too many emails for the email notifications to be helpful, but they work …

posts.author: jsliter (Jenna Sliter)
posts.cookedHtml: I have several managers on my team who don’t need to be in monday.com day to day, but they do need to reply when they are @mentioned. They receive too many emails for the email notifications to be helpful, but they work often via Microsoft Teams chat. I want us to be able to receive our personal notifications, particularly @mentions via chat. Currently, Teams only integrates with channels. This would be a game changer for my leadership team. We’ve already seen the success with our PageProof integration.

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: Jenna, this can be integrated with Zapier or similar. Have you tried that? We can help

posts.author: simplemonday (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is the exact problem I kept running into. Managers need to know when something changes, but posting to a channel means it gets buried in 30 other notifications nobody reads.

I ended up building an app for this called MSTeamsDirect+. It sends notifications straight to someone’s Teams chat from Monday.com automations. So when a status changes or a deadline hits, the right person gets a direct message instead of hoping they spot it in a channel.

Here’s the marketplace link if you want to take a look: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10001115/msteamsdirect
